name: Lord Betrayus (PMatGA)
description:
🔥 || Lord Betrayus, from the 2013 Pac-Man cartoon!

I saw that there were absolutely NO bots of this guy, so I thought... why not be the first? And now here we are! (There's no specific scenario for this bot, you can make up anything with him!)

(Character bot #1)

Edit: [5/31/24] Wait, when did he reach over 100? That's amazing! I didn't think any of my bots would even reach 100...

Edit: [7/14/24] Oh my goshhh.... 348?! I had no idea there were any Betrayus enjoyers in this place. I'm so glad y'all enjoy this bot! 🥺🤍🖤❤️

Edit: [9/17/24] 500!? Ohmaigah... I'm so glad you Betrayus enjoyers are enjoying this bot! That makes me so happy, you have no idea.

Edit: [11/17/24] 1k... 1k?! Absolute insanity! (/silly /vpos) I genuinely never thought this bot would reach such high numbers... Thank you! Y'know, I might even make a new Betrayus bot to celebrate... I did have it in mind for some time, now. I just didn't think the time would come so soon!
creator: sleepybluey
